title: Luxury Real Estate Wide Banner Kv AI
sourceTitle: Luxury Real Estate Wide Banner KV AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-wide 3:1 luxury real-estate banner advertisement for 云栖天境, built around 湖光之上，归于云境. Subject: 云栖天境 is presented as a premium property project; fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt acts as the secondary visual center supporting 城市封面, 湖居公园, 教育配套, 户型舒居, 商业配套, 山景资源. Scene: High-end real-estate proposal KV environment with modern Oriental minimalism, restrained luxury, large whitespace, low-saturation commercial material quality, and refined spatial design elements. Composition: Fixed 3:1 horizontal banner layout: main headline as first visual center, hero scene as second visual center, bottom thin information bar for 云栖天境 | 建面约 98-168㎡ | 城芯湖居 | VIP LINE 400-888-2026, and elegant hierarchy suitable for hoarding, outdoor billboard, or sales-office material. Signature Elements: Ultra-wide 3:1 real-estate KV layout, main headline as first visual center, elegant property hero scene as second visual center, thin bottom information bar, modern Oriental minimalism, large whitespace, translucent glass surfaces, curved spatial windows, pale grid, architectural linework, contour texture, waterline motifs, and restrained low-saturation luxury palette. Fixed source details: Hero Visual: lakefront park and elegant residential facade with distant city skyline. Style: Premium real-estate advertising, modern proposal board, light-luxury restraint, translucent glass surfaces, curved spatial windows, shallow gold lines, pale grid, architectural linework, contour textures, and waterline motifs. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Soft polished commercial lighting with airy highlights, calm architectural shadows, and refined outdoor-advertising clarity. Typography: 湖光之上，归于云境 appears as sparse large Chinese headline; 城市封面湖居资产，重塑东方松弛生活 appears as a smaller project value line; English microcopy and 云栖天境 | 建面约 98-168㎡ | 城芯湖居 | VIP LINE 400-888-2026 stay thin, restrained, and legible. Restrictions: Keep one coherent premium banner image, clear hierarchy, restrained luxury tone, readable Chinese headline, thin information bar, refined architectural visual packaging, clean spacing, low-saturation palette, and crisp commercial material quality.
